title: Deprecated code should be removed
description: Deprecated code should be removedAnalyze your codeintentionality-clearmaintainabilityCode SmellobsoleteWhy is this an issue?This rule is meant to be used as a way to track code which is marked as being deprecated. Deprecated code should eventually be removed.Noncompliant code example[Obsolete] // Noncompliant void Method() { // .. }Available In:Catch issues on the fly,in your IDEDetect issues in your GitHub, Azure DevOps Services, Bitbucket Cloud, GitLab repositoriesAnalyze code in youron-premise CIAvailable Since10.0Analyze code in youron-premise CIDeveloper EditionAvailable Since10.0©2025SonarSource Sàrl.
recommendation: Remove the problematic code and refactor as needed.

logic.exclusion_conditions: None - all obsolete code should be tracked
never_trigger_on: Test code (if tracking deprecated test utilities)
logic.reasoning: [Obsolete] marks code for removal. This rule tracks all deprecated code to ensure it's eventually cleaned up. Uses custom function to detect [Obsolete] attributes on all declarations including preceding lines.

should_trigger: [Obsolete("This is deprecated")] public string OldProperty { get; set; }

checks.message: Remove deprecated code marked with [Obsolete] attribute
